title: thelypteris orientalis
intro: Thelypteris orientalis, also known as the Oriental Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris orientalis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. It can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and made into capsules, for its medicinal and health benefits.
